Ali Moumen. https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/me.jpg https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/me.jpg >>>>>>> 3869458c2243771c44efa508dc84ab4379973266 Hugo -- 0.154.5 en-us Wed, 13 May 2026 20:04:03 +0100 <<<<<<< HEAD MPC - P3 http://localhost:1313/posts/mpc-3/ Wed, 13 May 2026 20:04:03 +0100 http://localhost:1313/posts/mpc-3/ ======= MPC - P3 https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/mpc-3/ Wed, 13 May 2026 20:04:03 +0100 https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/mpc-3/ >>>>>>> 3869458c2243771c44efa508dc84ab4379973266

Woah! Long time no see, readers!

I really am sorry for this long, long stop, I kind of got caught in the middle of university exams, work, and a bunch of other things. Additionally, my SSD failed and….came back to life, I think.

(Western Digital is totally to blame for that one).

Anyhow, we are very much back with the Malevolent Programming Course. I’m here now to continue your journey into mastering the art of instructing a piece of shiny rock to do stuff for you. So, without further clutter, allow me to begin.

MPC - P2 <<<<<<< HEAD http://localhost:1313/posts/mpc-2/ Sun, 01 Feb 2026 14:48:06 +0100 http://localhost:1313/posts/mpc-2/ ======= https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/mpc-2/ Sun, 01 Feb 2026 14:48:06 +0100 https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/mpc-2/ >>>>>>> 3869458c2243771c44efa508dc84ab4379973266

Section 1: Setup.

Before we get into writing our lovely, juicy code. We need to set our programming environment up so that we have everything we need to write, run, and test our code properly. The setup process will not be explained much in detail as it is assumed that you have some basic knowledge of how to use a computer (as specified in the previous post).

1.1: The code editor.

Code editors are pieces of software used to…well…write and edit code. There are numerous code editors out there, but I’m going to mainly focus on two for this course :

Malevolent Programming Course. <<<<<<< HEAD http://localhost:1313/posts/malevolent-programming-course/ Tue, 27 Jan 2026 15:18:45 +0100 http://localhost:1313/posts/malevolent-programming-course/ ======= https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/malevolent-programming-course/ Tue, 27 Jan 2026 15:18:45 +0100 https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/malevolent-programming-course/ >>>>>>> 3869458c2243771c44efa508dc84ab4379973266

In the lovely vibe and energy of my 18th birthday (🥳🥳🥳). I have decided to start writing a programming course. Something to help beginner programmers kickstart their journey and get a taste of what programming feels like.

Introducing:

The Malevolent Programming Course (MPC - not to be confused with “NPC”).

A comprehensive, realistic, and hands-on programming course written and maintained by me. It will cover many aspects of the software development process, including the non-technical ones, like system design and problem-solving.

Albinism <<<<<<< HEAD http://localhost:1313/posts/albinism/ Fri, 23 Jan 2026 17:35:10 +0100 http://localhost:1313/posts/albinism/ ======= https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/albinism/ Fri, 23 Jan 2026 17:35:10 +0100 https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/albinism/ >>>>>>> 3869458c2243771c44efa508dc84ab4379973266

Picture this:

You’re walking down the street, hands in pockets, hoodie on. Simply trying to get to point B without slipping down a puddle (the rain is insane here). A kid, maybe nine or ten years old, points at you and asks his mom “Mommy, look! why is he all white?!”.

This, my endeared reader, is a very normal situation for me. I’d usually just smile to the kid and his mom and then proceed to trip as my eyes measure the distance to the sidewalk wrong. Mainly because I had taken off my glasses due to the rain.

Writer's Syndrome. <<<<<<< HEAD http://localhost:1313/posts/writers-syndrome/ Wed, 21 Jan 2026 21:13:33 +0100 http://localhost:1313/posts/writers-syndrome/ ======= https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/writers-syndrome/ Wed, 21 Jan 2026 21:13:33 +0100 https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/writers-syndrome/ >>>>>>> 3869458c2243771c44efa508dc84ab4379973266

Creative writing is an interesting profession, or hobby, depending on how you approach. You have many ideas and, characters and worlds on one hand, and then you have blank pages on the other, waiting for you to translate your thoughts to them.

Whether you write fantasy, fiction (with all of its subgenres), romance, horror or a combination of all of those and more. Writers have many characteristics that specify their personalities which are derived from their artistic process. I call the combination of traits specifying a certain writer Writer’s Syndrome.

Machine Learning Project. <<<<<<< HEAD http://localhost:1313/posts/machine-learning-project/ Thu, 15 Jan 2026 20:36:36 +0100 http://localhost:1313/posts/machine-learning-project/ ======= https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/machine-learning-project/ Thu, 15 Jan 2026 20:36:36 +0100 https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/machine-learning-project/ >>>>>>> 3869458c2243771c44efa508dc84ab4379973266

I am quite fairly interested in machine learning and deep learning, while I really suck at the latter and love the former more. Both of them are very cool in my eyes. Such a beautiful mix of math, logic, and programming.

I’ve worked on many projects in both fields. I made CNNs that were supposed to distinguish between squares and circles, cats and dogs just to name a few. Well, these ones specifically failed miserably to do their job.

Education Systems and Writing <<<<<<< HEAD http://localhost:1313/posts/education-systems-and-writing/ Wed, 14 Jan 2026 16:47:04 +0100 http://localhost:1313/posts/education-systems-and-writing/ ======= https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/education-systems-and-writing/ Wed, 14 Jan 2026 16:47:04 +0100 https://blog.ali-moumen.tech/posts/education-systems-and-writing/ >>>>>>> 3869458c2243771c44efa508dc84ab4379973266

The thought of schools and education systems making my written works as mandatory school material will forever haunt me. It is eternal fucking damnation.

To be frank. Most of my work is essentially anti-institutional and no school will have a single clue about how to incorporate it in an educational manner, but if someone manages to do it. I imagine everything I have ever made getting absolutely butchered by teachers and professors.
